name: AutoCAD MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for AutoCAD — Autodesk's industry-standard CAD software. Enables AI agents to interact with AutoCAD drawings, execute AutoLISP or script commands, query drawing data, create/modify geometry, and automate CAD workflows — supporting AI-assisted engineering design and drafting.
use_cases: Querying AutoCAD drawing data and geometry from engineering analysis agents
Automating repetitive CAD operations from drafting automation agents
Creating or modifying geometry based on specifications from design agents
Integrating AutoCAD workflows into AI-driven engineering documentation systems
not_for: Teams without AutoCAD installed (requires AutoCAD license)
Teams using FreeCAD or other open-source CAD tools
Production automation without proper QA of generated CAD data
best_when: A mechanical engineer or drafter using AutoCAD wants AI agents to automate repetitive CAD tasks — generating geometry, querying drawing data, and executing standard drafting workflows.
avoid_when: You use SolidWorks, Fusion 360, or other CAD tools. AutoCAD licensing costs are significant — evaluate ROI before building AI automation on top. Community tool — not official Autodesk integration.

auth.notes: Local AutoCAD automation — requires AutoCAD installed and running. No separate auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Requires AutoCAD license (no free tier for AutoCAD)
pricing.notes: AutoCAD requires expensive professional license. MCP server is free open source community tool.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by AutoCAD operation speed and drawing complexity

known_agent_gotchas: Requires AutoCAD running with active drawing — agents can't operate without active AutoCAD session
CAD data modifications are directly applied to drawings — implement backups before agent use
AutoCAD API compatibility varies by version — test against your specific AutoCAD version
Engineering drawings may be safety-critical — human review of AI-generated CAD is essential
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local AutoCAD automation. No external data transmission. Engineering drawings may be IP-sensitive. Human review required for safety-critical CAD operations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local CAD automation. No credentials. Engineering IP stays local. Safety-critical drawings need human review.
